description_long: This stool features a woven rattan or wicker seat and backrest, supported by a slender black metal frame. The seat and backrest are constructed from interlaced natural fibers, forming a geometric, crisscross pattern that provides both support and visual interest. The frame consists of four straight legs, each connected by horizontal and diagonal metal supports for added stability. A metal footrest bar is integrated into the front of the frame, offering comfort for seated users. The overall design is lightweight and airy, with open spaces between the woven elements and the legs. The stool's style blends rustic natural materials with modern industrial metalwork, making it suitable for urban outdoor or indoor settings.
description: A woven rattan and black metal stool with a geometric seat and backrest, featuring a footrest and open, airy design. The style combines rustic and industrial elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the woven rattan backrest and seat, with the black metal frame and footrest bar clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the seat, the angle of the backrest, and the slender profile of the metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the woven rattan backrest and the symmetrical arrangement of the metal supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the seat's depth, backrest angle, and leg structure.
